title: Efficiently Dark
description: Combining efficient and dark mode to make Efficiently Dark, keeping only what is essential are making sure nothing can sneak up on you while in your inventory.
body:
### Description
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Efficiently Dark is a sleek and modern dark mode, made for all types of gameplay, making sure nothing can sneak up on you while in your inventory or any other gui. Keeping only what's necessary.
### Features
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Dark Mode UI
- Flat and modern 
- Dark Gray, Gray Color Palete
- Updates every once in 1 million years
### Support Me
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@PunyUmbrella)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/punyumbrella)
